title: Diplomatic Institute
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Diplomatic Institute''' was a center of [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomatic]] study on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], as of c. [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]]. [[Keval Raffaan]] attended the Institute.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1996-11-XX -->''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]''
